title: Pure Simulation Core, Effect Adapters, Events, and Dependency Direction · Contract Workshop
summary: A two-person studio incrementally builds testable game core and adapter architecture from original geometric fixtures while retaining earlier Python, repository, determinism, frame-budget, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of testable game core and adapter architecture while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model state transitions as deterministic functions over state, actions, time step, and injected randomness where practical.
Keep display, events, devices, audio, assets, persistence, clock, logging, and packaging behind thin owned adapters.
Emit immutable collision, score, life, wave, cue, and transition records and consume them in explicit order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Simulation
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Asteroids team handles case 4550 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Model state transitions as deterministic functions over state, actions, time step, and injected randomness where practical.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Simulation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model state transitions as deterministic functions over state, actions, time step, and injected randomness where practical. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Simulation, keep Pure Simulation connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Asteroids team handles case 4359 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. The record names the assumption, applies Architecture Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the audit the proposed evidence packet evidence boundary.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Architecture Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-architecture-evidence-1oqr37" that uses case 2592 to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Architecture Evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Architecture Evidence into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Architecture Evidence, keep Architecture Evidence connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-architecture-evidence-1oqr37
# Competency: asteroids-architecture-evidence.
# Case 2592: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def evidence_asteroids_architecture_evidence_1oqr37(pure_systems: int = 8, effect_adapters: int = 4, hidden_globals: int = 0, dependency_cycles: int = 0, immutable_events: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1oqr37 = "1oqr37-73rqo1-2592"
    assert evidence_variant_1oqr37
    evidence_axes_1oqr37 = (
        "player1oqr37",
        "seed2592",
        "input73rqo1",
        "frame1oqr372592",
        "state25921oqr37",
        "playtest73rqo12592",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1oqr37)) == 6
    if pure_systems < 4 or effect_adapters < 1:
        return False, pure_systems, "architecture-shape"
    if hidden_globals > 0:
        return False, hidden_globals, "hidden-state"
    if dependency_cycles > 0:
        return False, dependency_cycles, "dependency-cycle"
    if not immutable_events:
        return False, pure_systems, "mutable-events"
    assert pure_systems > effect_adapters
    return True, pure_systems, "testable-game-core"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend the transferred model · Workshop Architecture Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Architecture Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop Asteroids team handles case 1121 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Competency probe: Prove the pure core runs without pygame and the adapter composition runs headlessly without claiming visual or device quality.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prove the pure core runs without pygame and the adapter composition runs headlessly without claiming visual or device quality.
